title: Burjeel Holdings’ Tajmeel partners with Turkey’s Suzermed Clinic to launch a hair transplant facility in Dubai
summary: The new facility adds to Tajmeel's growing portfolio of over 30 specialized treatments spanning beauty, regenerative medicine, and surgical transformation.
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
UAE — Burjeel Holdings has announced a new strategic partnership between its premium aesthetics brand, Tajmeel, and Istanbul-based Suzermed Clinic, a specialist in advanced hair transplant procedures with clinics across Istanbul, Rome, and London.

The collaboration will establish a Suzermed-branded hair transplant facility inside Tajmeel’s flagship clinic in Jumeirah, Dubai.

A Partnership Built on Complementary Strengths

The two organizations signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) in Istanbul, outlining a model where each party contributes what it does best.

Tajmeel will provide fully equipped clinical space and manage day-to-day operations, while Suzermed Clinic will handle clinical delivery—including medical staffing, staff training, and its proprietary technical protocols.

Suzermed’s team comprises plastic surgeons, technicians, and medical professionals who follow internationally benchmarked standards refined across its global network.

The facility is expected to open its doors by May 2026.

Expanding Tajmeel’s Aesthetic Ecosystem

The new facility adds to Tajmeel’s growing portfolio of over 30 specialized treatments spanning beauty, regenerative medicine, and surgical transformation.

As a brand under Burjeel Holdings, Tajmeel has positioned itself as a comprehensive destination for advanced aesthetics.

Dr. Shamsheer Vayalil, Chairman and CEO of Burjeel Holdings, said the group consistently looks for partnerships that bring world-class expertise directly to its patients.

“This partnership with Suzermed Clinic allows us to move into a highly specialized segment of hair restoration, combining global clinical excellence with Tajmeel’s operational strength,” he said.

Hasan Süzer, CEO and Co-Founder of Suzermed Clinic, expressed enthusiasm about entering the UAE market through this collaboration.

“With our presence across multiple global cities, this partnership lets us apply our proven clinical methodologies in a market that values excellence, innovation, and precision in aesthetics,” he said.

Dubai’s Growing Appeal as an Aesthetics Hub

Dubai’s appeal as a destination for high-end aesthetic treatments continues to grow, attracting international clinics and investors seeking to tap into a market with strong demand for quality and innovation.

By bringing Suzermed Clinic’s hair restoration expertise to Jumeirah, this collaboration adds another layer to Dubai’s reputation as a regional leader in aesthetic medicine.

For patients in the UAE, it means access to globally refined hair transplant techniques without traveling abroad.
